sourcesContent:
const Data = [
    {
        id: 1,
        category: "education",
        icon: "icon-graduation",
        year: "2019 - 2023",
        title: "Bachelors of Science | Computer Science",
        desc: "Lorem Ipsum"
    },
    {
        id: 2,
        category: "experience",
        icon: "icon-briefcase",
        year: "July 2023 - Present",
        title: "Lockheed Martin | Software Engineer",
        desc: `● Worked in the Flight Software team on the Sustaining Lunar Development program under contract with Blue Origin
\n● Integrated database to manage over 500 commands and telemetry for Flight Software utilizing PostgresSQL
\n● Streamlined the management of external team telemetry requests, now utilized by 7 subsystem teams
\n● Partnered with software stakeholders to develop and document 150 flight software requirements, encompassing detailed
behavior specifications and cross-team needs, and led validation processes to ensure alignment with project objectives
\n● Evaluated reusable code to use in the Sustaining Lunar Development program to save business value`
    },
    {
        id: 3,
        category: "experience",
        icon: "icon-briefcase",
        year: "July 2022 - Augsut 2022",
        title: "Lockheed Martin | Software Engineer Intern",
        desc: "Lorem Ipsum"
    },
    {
        id: 4,
        category: "experience",
        icon: "icon-briefcase",
        year: "May 2021 - May 2022",
        title: "Cummins | Frontend Devloper Lead",
        desc: "Lorem Ipsum"
    },
    {
        id: 5,
        category: "experience",
        icon: "icon-briefcase",
        year: "August 2020 - May 2021",
        title: "Ford | Student Data Science Consultant",
        desc: "Lorem Ipsum"
    },
];

export default Data;
